name: Hank J. Wimbleton -- M:PN
description:
"I was hoping it would come to this."

DEAD DOVE BECAUSE UHH BLOOD AND SHIT. SFW INTRO.

The big bad mercenary, anti-hero, The protagonist, and just a psycho who wants blood on his hands. Hank Motherfucking Wimbleton.

And you'll have to work with him.

Or, rather, deal with his bullshit.

The bot is more of a MADNESS: Project Nexus version of Hank (since I view him as a 'different universe' Hank, shush), meaning he's a jackass with short temper.

The "user" takes on a role of Arena Player, and the setting is one that they're both working for Status Quo. Though, there's enough freedom for y'all to do whatever.

And nah, there's no "fixing him." I guess you 2 can enjoy slaughtering dozens of poor Nexus bastards together, though!

Make sure to leave a review or something. Also I'll prolly gonna be making Skinner M.D and Burger Gil bots? Maybe also Victor... We'll see.
creator: Finnska69_
